en.text: Whether to rinse the mouth after drinking milk

ar.text: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنَا زَكَرِيَّاءُ، عَنْ عَامِرٍ، عَنْ عُرْوَةَ بْنِ الْمُغِيرَةِ، عَنْ أَبِيهِ، قَالَ كُنْتُ مَعَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فِي سَفَرٍ، فَأَهْوَيْتُ لأَنْزِعَ خُفَّيْهِ فَقَالَ ‏ "‏ دَعْهُمَا، فَإِنِّي أَدْخَلْتُهُمَا طَاهِرَتَيْنِ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَمَسَحَ عَلَيْهِمَا‏.‏

al.text: Transmeton El-Mugireh ibn Shu’be: Isha me Pejgamberin (s.a.v.s.) në një udhëtim dhe u përula që t’ia hiqja mestet. Ai më tha: “Leri ato, sepse i kam mbathur duke qenë me abdest.” Pastaj, ai dha mes’h mbi to.

en.text: My father said, "Once I was in the company of the Prophet (ﷺ) on a journey and I dashed to take off his Khuffs (socks made from thick fabric or leather). He ordered me to leave them as he had put them after performing ablution. So he passed wet hands over them.
